---
name: Feature Request
about: Request a new feature or enhancement
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Summary
A brief description of the requested feature.

## GDD Reference
Link to the relevant section in the GDD or design documents.

## Motivation
Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Implementation
How should this feature work? Include any technical details.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Layer Assignment
Which layer should this feature belong to?
- [ ] `domain` - Pure gameplay rules/state
- [ ] `engine` - Runtime orchestration/rendering
- [ ] `infrastructure` - IO/config/parsing
- [ ] `app` - Entry point/assembly

## Priority
- [ ] P0 - Critical, blocks other work
- [ ] P1 - High, needed this iteration
- [ ] P2 - Medium, planned but can wait
- [ ] P3 - Low, nice to have
